Class ViewInviteUsers

java.lang.Object
guiInviteUsers.ViewInviteUsers
public class ViewInviteUsers extends Object

Title: ViewInviteUsers Class

Description: The View for the Invite Users page. This class provides the GUI for admins to generate invitation codes for new users.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
1.00 2026-02-09 Initial version
Author:
Lynn Robert Carter
